name: FileButton
description: Open file picker with a button click
searchText: filebutton open file picker with a button click @mantine/core /core/file-button accept capture children disabled form inputprops multiple name onchange resetref

props.name: accept
props.description: File input accept attribute, for example, "image/png,image/jpeg"

props.name: capture
props.description: Specifies that, optionally, a new file should be captured, and which device should be used to capture that new media of a type defined by the accept attribute.

props.name: children
props.description: Function that receives button props and returns react node that should be rendered

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Passes down props to the input element used to capture files

props.name: multiple
props.description: If set, user can pick more than one file

type.name: (payload: Multiple extends true ? File[] : File | null) => void

props.name: resetRef
props.description: Reference of the function that should be called when value changes to null or empty array
